title: Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Executor}}
{{Citation}}
[[File:NomAnor-NJOSB.png|thumb|right|180px|Nom Anor, Yuuzhan Vong Executor]]
'''Executor''' was a rank of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Intendant caste]]. Executors handled various day to day measures, and also managed valuable "living resources"—[[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], [[Worker caste|Workers]], and [[Shamed Ones]]. They were also sent out as spies and advance scouts.

[[Nom Anor]] and [[Eshin Worr]] held the rank. Another executor was on [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] negotiating with [[Lounha]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].

{{Stub}}
